124601.explanation: It's about the best team and what's best for Tiel, preferably a good mix of men and women.

124603.explanation: Depends on the initiative and the usage.

124606.explanation: There is a national ISDE scheme for this.

124607.explanation: Our municipality currently has enough large centers; we also want to enable our local crafts and SMEs to grow, ensuring sufficient employment.

124613.explanation: We are open to initiatives from the community.

124614.explanation: Tiel already does this through neighborhood cleanup days in collaboration with the housing corporation, Avri, Mozaïek, and the municipality of Tiel. This is highly appreciated and cleans up the area well.

124617.explanation: Evaluate and assess per plan (e.g., for own family: Yes. For labor migrants: No).

124618.explanation: This is already applied in Tiel for sports and culture.

124619.explanation: The broadcaster already receives funding from the national government and the municipality.

124620.explanation: This is already applied in Tiel, with cultural offerings at schools (paid by the municipality).

124623.explanation: From 2026 they will be employed by Tiel, bringing extra capacity.

124628.explanation: Holiday homes are for vacations and are necessary for the economy, tourism, and employment. Build more (temporary) homes to address urgent needs, for example, using vacant commercial buildings.

124630.explanation: Preferably as soon as possible towards a paid job.

124634.explanation: Private individuals can charge at their home address and neighborhoods will be equipped with public charging stations; the charging station follows the car.

124636.explanation: All care providers are contracted based on quality, customer satisfaction, and reliability. Through a personal budget (PGB), a resident can independently purchase care.

124641.explanation: We already have three very large sites; we prefer to use vacant lands for housing.

124643.explanation: A good balance in allocation that also leaves sufficient space for our own residents.

124645.explanation: We choose to utilize rooftops first.

124646.explanation: We already do this in Tiel.

124648.explanation: Provided a permit is requested that clearly states the purpose of rental. In the past, this has led to a proliferation of converted single-family homes in neighborhoods with sometimes 8 to 10 adult labor migrants per home.

124649.explanation: Preferably as low as possible. There are various possibilities in Tiel to make parking costs cheaper, e.g., (free) parking with Flippas.

124650.explanation: More and more people are living in the city center and we are losing some spaces to housing construction. The PvdB supports (partial) Waalkade parking.

124651.explanation: (Almost) all political parties in the Tiel municipal council already decided on the relocation in June 2020.

124652.explanation: In some neighborhoods this is perfectly fine; there is a high housing shortage.

124653.explanation: A good mix of parking on the edges and making it suitable for events and recreation.

124601.explanation: The municipal government should be a good reflection of the people who live in Tiel. This means equal numbers of men and women. Such a government represents all perspectives to make fair decisions.

124603.explanation: Improving the physical living environment together with residents is important to us. We focus on stimulating neighborhood activities aimed at connection and contact. We seek active involvement in neighborhood plans and make agreements per neighborhood.

124606.explanation: We are working towards an energy-rich Tiel. The ideal scenario is: residents collectively generate green and affordable electricity with a wind turbine or solar panels. They use the electricity locally, so the grid is not overloaded. Energy cooperatives are an asset to our municipality and should be encouraged.

124607.explanation: We advocate for a healthy economy that provides room for good and socially responsible entrepreneurship. Business activities are important up to a certain size and should be sustainable and proportionate to the surroundings to strengthen the community and build a livable city.

124609.explanation: We want the municipality to jointly steer the region towards achieving a better balance in housing, properly monitoring and enforcing living conditions for labor migrants. There is no place for exploitation and nuisance in our municipality. We also focus on small-scale housing.

124613.explanation: The best New Year's celebration is one we all enjoy together, with one large fireworks show organized by the municipality. This way, we keep it safe and can all enjoy a pleasant New Year's Eve together.

124614.explanation: Free collection should be possible under special circumstances. Bringing waste to Avri is already free.

124616.explanation: Accessibility is vital for people with disabilities. Through strong and focused efforts, we can contribute to an inclusive and just municipality where everyone has equal opportunities.

124617.explanation: There is a housing shortage in Tiel, and an extra home on the property can be a good solution—either as an additional source of income or as a suitable place for a parent who can no longer live independently. We want to make this possible for farmers who wish to do so.

124618.explanation: Sports give energy and keep you healthy. Sports clubs and neighborhood initiatives are facilitated, and membership fees should not be a barrier to participation. Support can be considered for families that can no longer afford the fees.

124619.explanation: Local media are important to know what is happening in your area, but there are multiple platforms and target groups the municipality must consider, such as the cultural platform that brings demand and supply closer together.

124620.explanation: Unfortunately, culture is currently neglected nationally. This is very unwise. We find it valuable that our youth in Tiel continue to be exposed to all kinds of culture. Music, like sports, belongs to a child's general education.

124623.explanation: Insecurity and nuisance in the neighborhood determine livability. We tackle crime firmly and focus on combating nuisance. We address problems before they become threats to safety.

124625.explanation: If you no longer feel safe at home, there must be a place you can always go to. A women's shelter is important in Tiel or the nearby region.

124628.explanation: Holiday homes are not a permanent solution for the housing shortage. But as long as the need is high, some people can use them. It is important that they can use the holiday home as a fixed address for as long as necessary.

124630.explanation: People are not on welfare because they don’t want to work. They need a stable foundation, affordable housing, and trust from the municipality. Extra demands and conditions only create more uncertainty and cause new problems.

124634.explanation: The use of electric cars must be encouraged. Proactively, more charging stations should be installed at suitable locations.

124636.explanation: In Tiel, there are many care recipients from different cultures and faith and belief systems. Care in Tiel must also address their emotional and cultural needs.

124638.explanation: With the current property tax (ozb), the pressure on funding care, social assistance, and cultural facilities is high. Our neighboring municipalities use our facilities and contribute more in property tax due to higher income groups and more expensive houses. This must change.

124639.explanation: Dogs can cause nuisance because dog waste is often not cleaned up in Tiel.

124641.explanation: When expanding business locations, including the possible expansion of Medel, we prioritize added value for our city, region, and residents. We want new companies and business sites to strengthen our city, region, residents, and (educational) facilities.

124643.explanation: People fleeing from war and violence must find a safe refuge. The municipality of Tiel must take its share in the necessary reception of asylum seekers. Reception should preferably be small-scale and spread out.

124645.explanation: A field full of solar panels can provide many households with clean, affordable energy. If farmers want, they should be able to use their land for this. Moreover, solar panels can be well combined with more biodiversity, for example by growing flowers and other low greenery.

124646.explanation: Providing swimming lessons at primary schools should be encouraged and supported because the number of drownings in our watery environment is high.

124648.explanation: We have a huge housing shortage, and many people in our municipality live more spaciously than actually necessary. Therefore, we want to make it easier to share homes, split them, or rent out individual rooms, provided they are well maintained and rented at a fair price.

124649.explanation: For special days and events organized by entrepreneurs in the center, parking is already free at this time. Moreover, we want to promote cycling and walking.

124650.explanation: We want to promote cycling and walking. At the moment, the parking spaces available in the entire center are still underused.

124651.explanation: We focus on prevention, control, and enforcement. This measure only leads to displacement, as opposed to a targeted solution. However, efforts are being made to reduce the number to three coffeeshops.

124652.explanation: We want to update the Tiel high-rise vision to have a proper framework for assessing new, tall spatial developments.

124653.explanation: The Waalkade is a beautiful place for meeting and connection. Together, we ensure a greener, more beautiful Tiel, better able to withstand heat and water nuisance.

124601.explanation: There should be a strive for a good reflection of society, with roughly equal numbers of men and women. But above all, it's about having the right qualities in the right place.

124603.explanation: By actively involving residents, these spaces can be designed in a way that suits the neighborhood and its inhabitants. In this way, together we create a livable municipality.

124606.explanation: However, they should receive support in other areas, for example, through guidance on how to design such a project and easier permit applications.

124607.explanation: The expansion of Medel (where such centers are located) can actually contribute to better employment opportunities in Tiel.

124609.explanation: This creates an irresponsible power position for employers.

124613.explanation: This significantly reduces the chance of serious fireworks accidents and damage. Moreover, it can be an occasion to celebrate the year with the municipality's residents in a cozy way.

124614.explanation: This prevents people from dumping waste in nature or adding it to underground containers.

124616.explanation: Everyone must be able to participate in our municipality. Accessible buildings are essential for this. Municipal buildings must, in any case, be well accessible for residents with disabilities.

124618.explanation: It must be possible for all residents to participate in sports and other activities at a club. A low income should not be a barrier to participation.

124619.explanation: The local broadcaster is very important to inform our residents about matters happening in their own municipality. If the local broadcaster can no longer sustain itself, we as a municipality must provide support.

124620.explanation: This should be possible for children whose parents have a low income and cannot afford it themselves.

124623.explanation: We should focus more on prevention.

124625.explanation: Victims of domestic violence must be able to live safely; especially with the current housing shortage, it is important to arrange shelter for them.

124628.explanation: Houses with a recreational designation should be used as such.

124630.explanation: This is not feasible for everyone. Many people who can do some work besides their benefit do so mainly because they want to. It gives meaning to their lives; making it mandatory is not appropriate.

124634.explanation: Electric driving helps reduce emissions, which we want to encourage.

124636.explanation: If those providers are available within an acceptable distance, that should definitely be possible.

124638.explanation: In Tiel, this (property tax) is already relatively low compared to surrounding municipalities. These revenues also give the municipality room to invest and maintain existing facilities.

124641.explanation: We must continue with the expansion of Medel; this offers great opportunities for increasing employment in Tiel.

124646.explanation: However, the municipality must finance swimming lessons for children of parents with a low income.

124648.explanation: We are against the subdivision of homes into multiple rental units; however, splitting or sharing homes should be possible. This should be assessed per situation.

124650.explanation: Research shows that there are currently sufficient parking spaces in Tiel; we prefer to stimulate cycling by providing decent bicycle parking and safe cycling routes in and around the center.

124651.explanation: The coffeeshops are currently too clustered in the city center; more dispersion would be beneficial. However, we see great risks if all coffeeshops would get a single pickup location.

124652.explanation: Where appropriate, this could certainly help solve the housing shortage. But it must be done in good consultation with residents and also considering the impact on the surroundings.

124653.explanation: There is currently sufficient parking in Tiel. In our view, greening the Waalkade and designating it as an event location is the proper development for the Waalkade.

124601.explanation: It's about quality. A good team has both women and men. The VVD opts for the best people in the best positions. In general, we are proponents of diversity.

124603.explanation: It depends, so tailor-made solutions. Continuity and quality are important. VVD Tiel chooses the long term, and expectations must be met.

124606.explanation: There are already sufficient national schemes that people can use when it comes to sustainable energy. VVD Tiel believes that sustainability should not become more expensive through subsidies.

124607.explanation: Distribution centers are necessary to distribute goods. They are also becoming increasingly high-quality. Tiel is located in an area that is logistically interesting. The new space for DCs is limited. Having only DCs is not good either; VVD strives for a diverse supply and land use, also for SMEs from the region.

124609.explanation: VVD Tiel believes this is a good solution for the countryside. We do impose requirements on the quality and require housing according to the applicable certification and safety standards.

124613.explanation: This concerns tax/community money for a limited group. It is better if entrepreneurs sponsor this. VVD wants to spend community money wisely, not waste it.

124614.explanation: If possible, a few times a year. Also collection campaigns in the neighborhood, especially for people who do not have their own transport. VVD Tiel supports this in cooperation with Avri, housing corporations, welfare organizations, and neighborhood coordinators.

124616.explanation: No, the municipality is not a contractor. Responsibility for private buildings lies with the owner. There must be compliance with rules for accessibility in relation to the UN Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities, and the Building Decree (Bbl) already regulates this. VVD finds that sufficient.

124617.explanation: Yes, but not unlimited and in line with the environmental plan and fulfilling the requirements of aesthetics and the Future Vision of Tiel. VVD supports more appropriate housing construction.

124618.explanation: There are schemes for social assistance. These are sufficient. Clubs often also have their own arrangements for those with less financial means. VVD: Care must be taken that people who work and earn little do not end up worse off compared to those on social assistance.

124619.explanation: This already happens via the Media Act and the granting of local broadcasting rights. VVD Tiel therefore does not find extra money necessary.

124620.explanation: VVD Tiel is in favor of music associations receiving compensation to provide lessons at schools.

124623.explanation: VVD Tiel is a strong supporter of more enforcement officers and visible police presence. Enforcement officers and police who assist people and address behavior. Safety in Tiel must improve to be an attractive city and to protect our countryside!

124625.explanation: Safety of women, children, and men is necessary. This can help and is currently arranged regionally.

124628.explanation: No, our recreational homes do not comply with the building code. National rules are leading, but it must be prevented that problems accumulate in a holiday park that is not suitable for that. VVD Tiel does not want abuse.

124630.explanation: If possible, yes. The best help for someone on social assistance is help towards a suitable job.

124634.explanation: There is a shortage of parking spaces in Tiel. VVD Tiel therefore wants to add 500 extra parking spaces for everyone. There are already sufficient spots to charge electric cars.

124636.explanation: If they want to, they must arrange it themselves. There is enough supply.

124638.explanation: The property tax (OZB) in Tiel is already relatively low, especially compared to neighboring municipalities. A reduction would also mean that certain investments can no longer be made.

124639.explanation: User pays and Tiel spends a similar amount on litter and dog parks.

124641.explanation: There is space for a Medel 3.

124643.explanation: No, VVD Tiel is against that.

124645.explanation: It depends on where and how much.

124646.explanation: It already exists. VVD Tiel considers school swimming important.

124648.explanation: House splitting (verkamering) in Tiel is a big problem. The center of Tiel and certain neighborhoods have many labor migrants. This also causes undesirable effects on livability. Therefore, house splitting must stop, and VVD Tiel wants to put an end to it.

124649.explanation: Parking is not very expensive in Tiel. The income is invested in better facilities. Everyone benefits from this; the city center, residents, and visitors.

124650.explanation: Yes, VVD Tiel wants to add around 500 parking spaces in total in Tiel to reduce parking pressure.

124651.explanation: Yes, VVD Tiel agreed to this decision in 2021 because the nuisance in the city center was too great. A new location will cause less nuisance because supervision can be much better. Residents live relatively further away, so the general interest takes priority.

124652.explanation: This offers opportunities for eye-catchers, for example along the Waal with high-quality large apartments for seniors and dual earners with a beautiful view.

124653.explanation: Limited parking possibility and mainly for overflow during busy events. Expansion is forthcoming, but not of the entire Waalplaat; other functions are also conceivable.

124601.explanation: CDA Tiel wants candidates to be selected based on their knowledge and skills but considers a healthy balance between men and women important.

124603.explanation: We do believe that playgrounds and small parks can be taken over by residents, but large facilities are the responsibility of the municipality itself.

124606.explanation: We support an initiative to generate sustainable energy together but believe this should be regulated nationally.

124607.explanation: We are not against distribution centers but prefer added value from other companies that also bring a different offering for our residents.

124609.explanation: We consider this the most suitable form of temporary shelter. Of course, with the obligation to meet the Roemer standard.

124613.explanation: From 2026 there will be a national fireworks ban, and therefore we believe we should be able to offer residents a professional fireworks show as an alternative.

124614.explanation: Bulky waste must be collected free of charge. This can be done through one monthly collection day or through organized 'waste days' in cooperation with AVRI.

124616.explanation: We find it important that entrepreneurs consider people with disabilities but believe that entrepreneurs themselves should bear responsibility. We will continue to engage with entrepreneurs to keep this topic on the agenda.

124617.explanation: No, we do not consider that a good solution for the housing shortage. If a farmer wants this, he can apply for a permit, and we want it to fit within the set frameworks.

124618.explanation: At this moment, that is already the case. We believe sports must be and remain accessible to everyone.

124619.explanation: We believe that an independent regional broadcaster is important for our municipality.

124620.explanation: No, we find music lessons important at schools, but additional music lessons are the responsibility of the parents. We think nationally it could be allocated based on income.

124623.explanation: We find having more enforcement officers on the street very important. We also believe that these officers should be employed directly by the municipality.

124625.explanation: We support women's shelters, but currently there is no need for such a shelter in Tiel. Victims from Tiel are not accommodated here but elsewhere in the country.

124628.explanation: No, this is not a solution for the housing shortage.

124630.explanation: We believe the Participation Act should be reformed nationally so that everyone can make a valuable contribution to society.

124634.explanation: We believe we must be prepared for the future, which means investing in charging facilities. There is already a plan in place, and residents can designate a municipal parking spot.

124636.explanation: CDA Tiel emphasizes in its healthcare theme that care should be affordable, accessible, and close by, and that people receive quick and appropriate help. We want healthcare to be person-centered, allowing space for attention to meaning and human support alongside medical care.

124638.explanation: CDA Tiel has always advocated for a low property tax because this directly affects families’ budgets.

124639.explanation: We consider dog tax a purpose tax, which it no longer is, so we want to abolish it.

124641.explanation: Tiel simply has no more space for additional sites. This should be arranged at the provincial level.

124643.explanation: No, we do not want priority for status holders.

124645.explanation: We believe the vulnerable rural area must be preserved. Solar parks on agricultural land do not belong there.

124646.explanation: In a water-rich area like Tiel, everyone should be able to swim. Therefore, we believe every child in Tiel should learn to swim.

124648.explanation: CDA Tiel is against subdividing homes into multiple units. This puts extra and demonstrable pressure on livability, safety, and the housing market in Tiel, which we want to prevent.

124649.explanation: No, parking rates are currently low. However, we support free parking on Sundays and during the festive month.

124650.explanation: In 2025, Tiel conducted research showing that more parking spaces are needed long-term in several areas around the center. We want the center to remain easily accessible, so more parking spaces must be created over time.

124651.explanation: We are strongly against a 'weed boulevard' and centralization of this. We want a phase-out policy (no new coffeeshops) and to include in the municipal regulations a ban on centralizing coffeeshops in one location.

124652.explanation: We do not find such tall buildings fitting for Tiel. Our ideal is not high residential complexes but rather what fits livability and community building in our municipality.

124653.explanation: Yes, we welcome this and have advocated for it before. However, due to national nitrogen rules, it is currently not possible, and therefore we want to investigate in what form this could be feasible.

124601.explanation: The quality of the alderman determines the choice for the executive board.

124603.explanation: Taking over management by residents increases engagement with the municipality and may also save costs.

124606.explanation: Subsidies for sustainable energy, including jointly generated energy, are not part of FVD’s policy.

124607.explanation: Tiel’s location is very suitable for the distribution sector. If there is space in the business parks, this sector can be expanded.

124609.explanation: Where possible, this is the best solution for housing seasonal workers. FVD wants labor migrants living in Tiel to work close to Tiel.

124613.explanation: A fireworks show is beautiful but very costly. That money can be better spent.

124614.explanation: Bulky waste is collected at home for a fee, and that should remain so.

124616.explanation: If entrepreneurs incur high costs making their building more accessible, the municipality can contribute to these costs.

124617.explanation: Provided it is intended for personal residence, this should be allowed.

124618.explanation: In addition to welfare benefits, there are multiple municipal allowances, which can partially cover membership fees.

124619.explanation: The local broadcaster receives sufficient funding from the municipality.

124620.explanation: All primary school children can be introduced to music education with a subsidy from the municipality.

124623.explanation: Street safety is increased by the presence of enforcement officers.

124625.explanation: There are sufficient options in the region for temporary shelter for women and children.

124628.explanation: The housing market is overcrowded, and holiday homes can serve as extra space in that market.

124630.explanation: Where possible, it is important that people receiving welfare benefits continue to contribute to society.

124634.explanation: There are sufficient charging points in the municipality of Tiel.

124636.explanation: Good care is not dependent on religion, culture, or belief.

124638.explanation: There are sufficient opportunities within the municipality of Tiel to make budget cuts.

124639.explanation: Dog tax is an unfair tax.

124641.explanation: There are sufficient business parks in Tiel.

124643.explanation: Asylum seekers with a residence permit should no longer be given priority for social housing. The current arrangement is unfair to previous applicants.

124645.explanation: Agricultural land must continue to be used for food security. Solar panels can be installed on roofs.

124646.explanation: The municipality of Tiel organizes many opportunities for children to exercise. Swimming lessons are the responsibility of the parents.

124648.explanation: Partitioning homes can be a good solution for the housing shortage. However, separate rooms are too small as independent living spaces because they can cause nuisance.

124649.explanation: The parking fees near the center make shopping less attractive. The inner city deserves support instead.

124650.explanation: The current housing plans are causing many parking spaces in the inner city to disappear, while more are needed. Therefore, it is important that more parking space is created, especially near the Waalkade.

124651.explanation: The plan to relocate the coffeeshops is not a good plan. It is not only inconvenient for nearby residents but also burdens the surrounding area with much extra traffic.

124652.explanation: Tiel is a charming city on the Waal River. Extremely tall residential complexes will only attract more urbanization, which does not fit the current city or its surroundings.

124653.explanation: Parking at the Waalkade makes the inner city and the market much more accessible and lively again. Moreover, it is much more attractive for events to have a larger paved area at the Waalkade.

124601.explanation: The best candidates should be chosen.

124603.explanation: Yes to parks, we already do that in several locations; the sports hall is used too diversely to allow this to be done by residents.

124606.explanation: A good initiative pays for itself.

124607.explanation: If there is a choice to attract a company where many people can work, that is explicitly preferred.

124609.explanation: Housing should be decoupled from the employer. Preferably carried out by housing corporations.

124613.explanation: Air pollution is bad enough already.

124614.explanation: In the hope of significantly fewer illegal disposals.

124616.explanation: Accessibility is already enshrined in law.

124617.explanation: Only if it concerns a company-provided residence.

124618.explanation: This should apply to all people living below the minimum standard.

124619.explanation: A good local broadcaster secures extra funding through advertisements itself.

124620.explanation: This is very good for general development.

124623.explanation: We have enough of them but they should focus on safety.

124628.explanation: We must attract tourists to us.

124630.explanation: There are plenty of tasks to do, everyone joins in!

124638.explanation: Due to market forces, it naturally becomes more expensive.

124639.explanation: This is part of the responsibility when having a pet.

124643.explanation: We must apply the rules; conversely, we also hope to be helped when we are in need.

124645.explanation: But as much as possible out of sight.

124646.explanation: In the Netherlands, the land of water, everyone should be able to swim.

124648.explanation: The hospita system. The tenant becomes part of the household.

124649.explanation: People should come by bike and public transport.

124650.explanation: There are enough, but many more bicycle parking facilities are needed.

124652.explanation: It must fit in with the surroundings.

124653.explanation: A beautiful and above all green environment.

statements.title: Tiel should allow residential complexes of ten stories or more.
The new college of mayor and aldermen must have an equal number of men and women.

titleParts.glossary: The college of mayor and aldermen, the municipality’s executive board.
The mayor leads the municipality and chairs the municipal council. The mayor is not elected but appointed by the national government, after recommendation by the municipal council.

titleParts.text: en wethouders moet het aantal mannen en vrouwen gelijk zijn.

statements.title: Tiel should have more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) focused on public safety.

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: Residents should be able to take over the management of, for example, a sports hall or a public green space from the municipality.
Employers in agriculture and horticulture should provide housing for seasonal workers on their own premises.

titleParts.text: Werkgevers in de land- en tuinbouw moeten zelf zorgen voor de huisvesting van

titleParts.glossary: People who do work that only takes place during certain seasons, often in agriculture and fruit picking.

statements.title: The municipality must oppose the establishment of new distribution centers.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de vestiging van nieuwe

titleParts.glossary: Large warehouses where goods are received, sorted and transported to other locations.

statements.title: The municipality should financially help business owners to make their buildings accessible to people with disabilities.

titleParts.glossary: Something related to money.

titleParts.text: helpen om hun gebouw toegankelijker te maken voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Something that limits you in daily life. A disability can be physical or intellectual or relate to hearing or sight, or combinations of these.

statements.title: The municipality should remove the coffee shops from the city centre and relocate them together next to the A15.

titleParts.glossary: Shops or cafés where you can buy and smoke soft drugs (hash, weed).

titleParts.text: weghalen uit de binnenstad en samen herplaatsen naast de A15.

statements.title: The municipality should pay the membership fees for a sports club for people receiving social assistance.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet het lidmaatschap van een sportclub betalen voor mensen met een

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.

statements.title: The municipality should organize a fireworks show on New Year's Eve.
The municipality should abolish the dog tax.

titleParts.glossary: Tax paid to the municipality for owning one or more dogs.

statements.title: The municipality should support the local broadcaster with additional funding.

titleParts.glossary: Radio and television by and for people from the municipality and the immediate area.

statements.title: More parking spaces should be created in the center.
Bulky waste must be collected from homes free of charge.
More business parks should be created in Tiel.
Every primary school child should be able to receive music lessons subsidized by the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.

titleParts.text: van de gemeente muziekles kunnen krijgen.

statements.title: The property tax (onroerendezaakbelasting, OZB) should be reduced.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.
Property tax. Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: It should be possible for farmers to build houses themselves on their land.
Paid parking in the center should be made cheaper.
The municipality must allow holiday homes to be used as a permanent residence.
The municipality should ban solar panels on agricultural land.
Tiel should have a shelter for victims of domestic violence.

titleParts.glossary: Shelter for women who experience violence from their partner or family. The shelter is secured; sometimes the location is secret.

statements.title: People who need care should always be able to choose a caregiver who matches their religion, culture, or beliefs.

titleParts.text: Mensen die zorg nodig hebben, moeten altijd kunnen kiezen voor een zorgverlener die past bij hun geloof, cultuur of

titleParts.glossary: What someone believes about life, such as a religion or personal conviction.

statements.title: The municipality must continue to give refugees with a residence permit priority for social housing.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet vluchtelingen met een

titleParts.glossary: The right to reside in the Netherlands. The term can refer to the right itself or to the card that shows someone has that right.
A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: The municipality should allow landlords to rent out individual rooms instead of entire houses.
The municipality should designate more parking spaces as charging points for electric cars.
The municipality should allocate money for school swimming.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet geld beschikbaar stellen voor

titleParts.glossary: Swimming lessons organized by the school.

statements.title: The Waalkade should become a parking area again.
